summary.volDesc: Market in long-gamma regime — dealers suppressing volatility. Premium selling favored.
summary.dealerSummary: Dealers net long delta — sell-rally pressure across markets

signals.title: Long Gamma Regime — NIFTY
signals.desc: Net GEX = +896.5Cr. Dealers LONG gamma: volatility suppression. Expect range-bound price; premium selling favored.

signals.title: Dealers Long Delta — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer net delta: +21,267,101 contracts. Dealers will sell into rallies — capping upside. Best to sell CEs near resistance.

signals.title: IV Elevated — NIFTY: 28.9%
signals.desc: ATM IV at 28.9% — options richly priced. Sell premium via iron condors or spreads. Avoid naked option buying.

signals.title: Zero-Gamma Level Close — NIFTY @ ₹23,020
signals.desc: Spot within 0.1% of zero-gamma (23,020). Crossing this level could trigger accelerated moves as dealer hedging flips direction.

signals.title: Fresh Call Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000
signals.desc: CE OI at ₹23,000 growing +70% today (157,517 OI). Strong resistance wall forming — sell CE spreads above this level.

signals.title: Dealer Flip Level @ ₹23,025 — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer delta flips at ₹23,025 (0.2% away). Crossing this triggers forced directional hedging — potential for sharp acceleration.

signals.title: Fresh Put Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000
signals.desc: PE OI at ₹23,000 growing +41% today (188,343 OI). Strong support floor — sell PE spreads below this level.

signals.title: Max Pain Pull — NIFTY: ₹23,200.0 (+0.9%)
signals.desc: Max pain at ₹23,200.0 is 0.9% above spot. Expiry gravity pulls price toward this level. Strongest within 3 days of expiry.
